title: First Day at the Gym
scene: 你第一次去健身房，在前台办会员。

turns.en: Welcome! Is this your first time here?

turns.cn: 是的，我想了解一下会员套餐。
turns.en: Yes, I'd like to learn about your membership plans.

turns.cn: 月卡四十九，年卡四百九十九。
turns.en: It's forty-nine a month, or four ninety-nine for the year.
Does the annual plan include personal training sessions?
It includes two free trial sessions.
Great, I'll sign up for the annual membership.

turns.cn: 请填一下这张表，我带您参观一下。
turns.en: Please fill out this form, and I'll give you a tour.
Where are the locker rooms?

title: Using Equipment
scene: 你想用跑步机，但有人在用。

turns.cn: 你好，这台跑步机你还要用很久吗？
turns.en: Hi, are you going to be on the treadmill much longer?
About five more minutes.
No problem. I'll wait. Thanks!
All done. It's all yours.

turns.cn: 谢谢！你知道哑铃区在哪里吗？
turns.en: Thanks! Do you know where the free weights are?

turns.cn: 在后面，过那个双开门就是。
turns.en: In the back, just past those double doors.
Got it. Thanks again!

title: After the Workout
scene: 你刚练完，在休息区和朋友聊天。

turns.en: How was your workout today?
Pretty tough, but I feel great.
How long did you work out?

turns.cn: 大概四十五分钟，主要练了腿。
turns.en: About forty-five minutes. Mostly leg day.

turns.cn: 要不要一起去喝杯蛋白奶昔？
turns.en: Want to grab a protein shake together?
Sure, I'm pretty thirsty.
Let's go. The place downstairs is pretty good.

title: Personal Trainer
scene: 你的第一节私教课，教练在指导你。

turns.cn: 先热身五分钟，慢跑或者跳绳。
turns.en: Let's warm up for five minutes, jogging or jump rope.

turns.cn: 好的。我今天主要练什么？
turns.en: Okay. What are we focusing on today?

turns.cn: 上肢和核心，先做三组俯卧撑。
turns.en: Upper body and core. Start with three sets of push-ups.

turns.cn: 标准俯卧撑我做不了几个。
turns.en: I can't do many regular push-ups.
That's fine. Do them on your knees for now.

turns.cn: 做完这组感觉手臂好酸。
turns.en: My arms are burning after that set.

turns.cn: 很正常，休息一分钟再继续。
turns.en: That's normal. Rest one minute and we'll continue.

title: Locker Room
scene: 练完后你在更衣室，发现忘带毛巾。

turns.cn: 不好意思，有多余的毛巾吗？
turns.en: Excuse me, do you have an extra towel?

turns.cn: 前台可以租，一美元一条。
turns.en: You can rent one at the front desk for a dollar.
Are the showers available right now?

turns.cn: 应该有空位，高峰时段要排队。
turns.en: There should be open stalls, but it gets crowded at peak hours.

turns.cn: 储物柜的锁是自带的吗？
turns.en: Do I need my own lock for the locker?
Yes, or you can buy one at the front desk.
Got it. Thanks!

title: Personal Trainer
scene: 你想请私人教练帮你制定训练计划。

turns.en: What's your fitness goal?

turns.cn: 想减脂，顺便增强核心力量。
turns.en: I want to lose fat and build core strength.

turns.cn: 每周能来几次？有无旧伤？
turns.en: How many days a week can you come? Any old injuries?

turns.cn: 每周三次，膝盖以前受过伤。
turns.en: Three times a week. I had a knee injury before.

turns.cn: 我们会避开高冲击动作，先评估体态。
turns.en: We'll avoid high-impact moves and assess your form first.
How much are personal sessions?

turns.cn: 单次六十，买十节送一节。
turns.en: Sixty per session, or buy ten and get one free.

title: Renewing Membership
scene: 你的健身房年卡快到期，前台劝你续费。

turns.cn: 您的年卡月底到期，续费有优惠。
turns.en: Your annual membership ends this month. Renewal is on sale.
How much for another year?

turns.cn: 现在续四百五，比平时便宜五十。
turns.en: Four fifty if you renew now, fifty off the regular price.

turns.cn: 能暂停一个月吗？我要出差。
turns.en: Can I freeze it for a month? I'll be traveling.

turns.cn: 年卡可冻三十天，一年一次。
turns.en: Annual plans get thirty freeze days once a year.

turns.cn: 好，我续费，出差回来再冻。
turns.en: Okay, I'll renew and freeze when I travel.
Thank you. You can pay by card right here.

title: Trainer Package Renewal
scene: 你的私教课快用完了，教练建议你续课。

turns.en: You have two sessions left. Want to keep going?

turns.cn: 效果不错，有套餐优惠吗？
turns.en: It's working well. Any package deals?

turns.cn: 二十节一千，相当于五十一节。
turns.en: Twenty sessions for a thousand, fifty per session.
Can we switch to twice a week?

turns.cn: 可以，周二四上午我还有空。
turns.en: Sure. Tuesday and Thursday mornings are open.
Okay, I'll take the twenty-pack.
Great. Let's keep pushing!

title: Free Trial Class
scene: 你第一次来健身房，参加免费体验课。

turns.cn: 欢迎体验课！有旧伤或心脏病史吗？
turns.en: Welcome to your trial! Any injuries or heart conditions?

turns.cn: 膝盖以前扭伤过，其他没有。
turns.en: I sprained my knee before. Nothing else.

turns.cn: 好，今天做低冲击有氧加热身拉伸。
turns.en: Okay. Today we'll do low-impact cardio plus stretching.
Do I need to book machines?

turns.cn: 高峰可能要等，私教课优先。
turns.en: You might wait at peak hours. Training sessions get priority.
Any signup deal after the trial?

turns.cn: 今天办 waive 入会费，省五十。
turns.en: Sign up today and we waive the fifty-dollar enrollment fee.

title: Asking for a Spot
scene: 你做大重量卧推，请旁边的人帮忙保护。

turns.cn: 不好意思，能帮我spot一下吗？最后一组。
turns.en: Excuse me, could you spot me? Last set.
Sure. How much weight?

turns.cn: 一百三十五，力竭帮我托起来就行。
turns.en: One thirty-five. Help me up if I fail.
Got it. I'll stand behind you. Call it.
Up! …Thanks. That was the last rep.
Nice work.
Really appreciate it!

title: Wipe Down Equipment
scene: 工作人员提醒你练完要擦器械。

turns.cn: 练完请用消毒巾擦一下垫子。
turns.en: Please wipe down the bench when you're done.
Sorry, where are the wipes?

turns.cn: 每个器械旁墙上，黄色桶里。
turns.en: On the wall by each station. Yellow bucket.
Okay. I'll wipe it after my set.
Thanks. Keeps it clean for everyone.
Got it.

title: Spin Class Booking
scene: 你在前台预约动感单车团课。

turns.cn: 周三晚七点的spin还有三个位。
turns.en: Three spots left for Wednesday seven PM spin.

turns.cn: 帮我订一个，新手合适吗？
turns.en: Book one for me. Is it okay for beginners?
Yes. You control your own resistance.
How early should I arrive?
Ten minutes to adjust your bike.
Can I still get in if I'm late?
Door closes five minutes after start.

title: Working In
scene: 卧推凳有人用，你问能否交替练。

turns.cn: 你还有多少组？能work in吗？
turns.en: How many sets do you have left? Can I work in?
Two sets. Sure. Go lighter if you need to.
Thanks. I'll change plates fast.
No worries. We can alternate.
You go first on this set.
Sounds good.

title: Squat Form Check
scene: 私教纠正你深蹲姿势。

turns.en: Don't let your knees cave in. Keep your heels down.
How deep should I go? My lower back feels tight.

turns.cn: 大腿平行地面，挺胸，先减重量。
turns.en: Thighs parallel to the floor. Chest up. Drop the weight.
Is this better?

turns.cn: 好多了，记住呼吸，下去吸气起来呼气。
turns.en: Much better. Breathe in down, out on the way up.
How many more sets?
Two more. Form beats weight.

title: Class Waitlist
scene: 你想上的瑜伽课满了，前台帮你候补。

turns.cn: 周六上午瑜伽满了，要候补吗？
turns.en: Saturday morning yoga is full. Want the waitlist?
Yes. Will you notify me if someone cancels?

turns.cn: 提前两小时短信，确认才占位。
turns.en: Text two hours ahead. You must confirm to hold the spot.
I bring my own mat, right?
Yes, and bring water.
Thanks.

title: Protein Shake Bar
scene: 练完你在健身房吧台点蛋白奶昔。

turns.cn: 要什么？巧克力还是香草？
turns.en: What'll it be? Chocolate or vanilla?

turns.cn: 香草，加一勺蛋白粉，少冰。
turns.en: Vanilla with a scoop of protein, easy on the ice.
Members get twenty percent off. Six forty.
Can you add banana?
Fifty cents extra.
Sure. Card please.
Two minutes.

title: Guest Pass
scene: 你想带朋友来健身房体验一天。

turns.en: Can I bring a guest on my annual membership?

turns.cn: 每月一次免费，额外十块一天。
turns.en: One free guest day per month. Extra days are ten bucks.

turns.cn: 朋友周六来，需要预约吗？
turns.en: My friend comes Saturday. Do I need to book?
Register their name at the desk and sign a waiver.
Can we take a group class together?
Guests are allowed. Book the class separately.
Okay. Thanks.

title: Sauna Rules
scene: 你第一次用健身房桑拿，问工作人员。

turns.en: How do I use the sauna?

turns.cn: 不用预约，每次最多十五分钟，带毛巾垫坐。
turns.en: No booking. Fifteen minutes max. Sit on a towel.

turns.cn: 可以带水吗？手机能带吗？
turns.en: Can I bring water? My phone?
Water yes. Leave your phone. It overheats.
Are men's and women's separate?
Yes, inside the locker rooms.
Thank you.

title: Cable Machine Help
scene: 你不会用绳索下拉器械，请教练示范。

turns.en: How do I adjust this lat pulldown?

turns.cn: 坐稳，大腿固定，把手拉到锁骨。
turns.en: Sit tight, thighs under the pad, pull to your collarbone.
Wide grip or narrow?
Wide for beginners. Drive your elbows down.
What weight should I start with?

turns.cn: 五十磅，十二次三组建控制。
turns.en: Fifty pounds. Three sets of twelve with control.
Got it. Thanks.

title: Injury During Workout
scene: 你拉伤肌肉，向前台要冰袋。

turns.cn: 我肩膀拉了一下，有冰袋吗？
turns.en: I tweaked my shoulder. Do you have ice?
First aid kit. Sit here. Is it serious?

turns.cn: 应该不严重，先冰敷十五分。
turns.en: Probably not. I'll ice it fifteen minutes.
See a doctor if pain keeps up.
I'll skip the rest today.
Need us to call a ride?
No, I can get home. Thanks.

title: Foam Rolling Area
scene: 教练教你用泡沫轴放松大腿。

turns.cn: 练完腿要滚一下，慢，别压骨头。
turns.en: Roll your legs after leg day. Go slow. Avoid bone.
Is it supposed to hurt?

turns.cn: 有点酸正常，剧痛就轻一点。
turns.en: A little soreness is normal. Ease up if it's sharp pain.
How long per leg?
Thirty seconds to a minute.
Okay. I'll do it after my workout.

title: Rowing Machine
scene: 你第一次用划船机，问正确姿势。

turns.cn: 划船机顺序是什么？腿先还是手先？
turns.en: What's the order on the rower? Legs first or arms?

turns.cn: 腿、臀、手，回去顺序反过来。
turns.en: Legs, hips, arms out. Reverse on the way back.
Should I round my back?
No. Keep your back flat and core tight.
Is ten minutes enough for warmup?
Yes. Don't yank hard at the start.

title: Cancel Membership
scene: 你搬家要取消会员，前台说明流程。

turns.cn: 我要搬家，能取消年卡吗？
turns.en: I'm moving. Can I cancel my annual membership?

turns.cn: 提前三十天书面通知，可能收手续费。
turns.en: Thirty days written notice. There may be a fee.
Can I transfer it to a friend?

turns.cn: 年卡不可转，月卡可以一次。
turns.en: Annual plans aren't transferable. Monthly allows one transfer.
Okay. Please give me the cancellation form.
Fill it out and we'll email confirmation.

title: Lost Locker Key
scene: 你弄丢了健身房储物柜钥匙。

turns.cn: 储物柜钥匙丢了，能开吗？
turns.en: I lost my locker key. Can you open it?
With ID we'll cut the lock. Twenty-five dollars.

turns.cn: 里面有东西，现在能处理吗？
turns.en: My stuff's inside. Can you do it now?
Five minutes. Wait nearby.
I'll rent a lock from you next time.
Good idea. Five a month.

title: Pilates Reformer
scene: 你第一次上普拉提器械课。

turns.cn: 第一次上reformer？脚放栏上，轻弹簧。
turns.en: First reformer class? Feet on the bar, light springs.
Should I mention my lower back?
Definitely. I'll modify moves for you.
What if I can't keep up?
Slow down. Breathe. Don't hold your breath.
Okay.

title: Deadlift Platform
scene: 你想用硬拉台，有人在旁边休息。

turns.en: Are you still using this platform?

turns.cn: 最后一组，两分钟让给你。
turns.en: Last set. I'll be done in two minutes.

turns.cn: 能一起用吗？我轻重量热身。
turns.en: Mind if I warm up light while you finish?
Sure. Just stay out of the way.
I'll wipe the chalk when I'm done.
Thanks.
